vulnerabilities.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing. CSP helps prevent Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and data injection attacks by specifying which content sources are allowed.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add a Content-Security-Policy header. Example: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'

vulnerabilities.description: X-XSS-Protection header is missing. While modern browsers have built-in XSS filters, this header provides an extra layer for older browsers.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block

vulnerabilities.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Without 'nosniff', browsers may MIME-sniff responses, potentially executing malicious content.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

vulnerabilities.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. This header controls how much referrer information is sent with requests, protecting user privacy.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

vulnerabilities.description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. This header controls which browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) the page can use.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Permissions-Policy header. Example: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

vulnerabilities.description: Server header exposes server software: 'AkamaiNetStorage'. Attackers can use this to find known vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities.fix: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.

vulnerabilities.description: Port 80 (HTTP) is open.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.

vulnerabilities.description: Port 443 (HTTPS) is open.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure only necessary ports are open. Review firewall rules.

vulnerabilities.description: Path '/admin' is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). This may expose sensitive data or admin interfaces.
vulnerabilities.fix: Restrict access to '/admin' using authentication, firewall rules, or server configuration. Remove unnecessary files.

vulnerabilities.description: Found 6 subdomains: www.hotstar.com, mail.hotstar.com, blog.hotstar.com, staging.hotstar.com, api.hotstar.com, vpn.hotstar.com. Each subdomain increases the attack surface.
vulnerabilities.fix: Audit all subdomains. Ensure unused subdomains are removed and all active ones are secured.
